ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "study_type" INTEGER /* ID of the study type */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  "data_source" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used in the study */,
  "status" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the study */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the study */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the study */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location where the study was conducted */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and categorization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the study details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_study_type FOREIGN KEY ("study_type") REFERENCES study_types ("study_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "coefficient" REAL /* Coefficient of the parameter */,
  "coefficient_100" REAL /* Coefficient multiplied by 100 */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the coefficient */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval */,
  "ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "t_statistic" REAL /* t-statistic */,
  "degrees_of_freedom" INTEGER /* Degrees of freedom */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of values for the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the parameter details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_types" (
  "study_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study type */,
  "study_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the study type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study type */,
  "related_fields" TEXT /* Related fields or disciplines */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the study type details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data source details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the status details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the role details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the study */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the changes made in the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the version details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "external_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the external data source is integrated into */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the external data source was integrated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the external data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the external data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the external data source details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_sources_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the publication is based on */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the publication details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
